channel.title: Dory's Cleaning Services Blog
channel.description: Healthcare facility cleaning insights, infection control guides, and compliance tips for Massachusetts medical facilities.

item.title: Bloodborne Pathogen Cleanup for Clinics | Guide
item.description: OSHA-compliant bloodborne pathogen cleanup protocols for healthcare facilities. PPE, disinfectants, documentation. Expert MA cleaning guide.

item.title: CDC Compliance for Clinic Sanitation | Expert Guide [Guide]
item.description: How specialty clinics meet CDC sanitation standards. Protocols, EPA products & documentation requirements. By a 22-year clinical professional.

item.title: How to Choose Healthcare Cleaning in MA | 7 Tips
item.description: 7 questions to ask before hiring a healthcare cleaning service in Massachusetts. Credentials, red flags & what to look for.

item.title: Clinical Cleaning vs Janitorial: Key Differences
item.description: What's the real difference between clinical healthcare cleaning and standard janitorial services? Critical distinctions for MA medical facilities.

item.title: COVID-Era Cleaning: 5 Permanent Changes
item.description: How COVID transformed healthcare facility cleaning forever. Higher disinfection standards, ATP testing, and the new normal for MA clinics.

item.title: Dental Office Sterilization Guide
item.description: Complete sterilization and environmental services guide for dental offices. CDC, OSHA compliance, and infection control standards.

item.title: Quality Control for Healthcare Cleaning
item.description: How to build a quality control program for healthcare environmental services. ATP testing, audits, and compliance documentation.

item.title: EPA Disinfectants for Healthcare | Complete Guide [Guide]
item.description: How to choose EPA-registered disinfectants for healthcare. List N, kill claims & application protocols explained. Expert guide.

item.title: Healthcare Cleaning Staff Training | What to Know [Guide]
item.description: What training do healthcare cleaning staff need? Bloodborne pathogens, PPE, infection control & HIPAA requirements explained.

item.title: Healthcare Cleaning RFP Checklist
item.description: 15-point RFP checklist for evaluating healthcare cleaning vendors. Credentials, protocols, insurance — what every facility manager needs.

item.title: MA Healthcare Inspection Prep Guide
item.description: How to prepare for Massachusetts DPH healthcare facility inspections. Cleaning standards, documentation, and compliance checklist.

item.title: High-Touch Disinfection Frequency Guide
item.description: Best practices for high-touch surface disinfection in healthcare. CDC-recommended frequencies for different facility types and risk areas.

item.title: Outpatient Cleaning Around Clinical Schedules [2026 Guide]
item.description: How to schedule facility environmental cleaning around clinical workflows. Minimize disruption while maintaining infection control. Expert tips inside.

item.title: Infection Control for Medical Offices | Best Practices
item.description: Complete guide to disinfection & high-touch surface cleaning in medical offices. CDC protocols explained by a 22-year clinical cleaning pro.

item.title: Infection Prevention in Specialty Clinics | Guide [Guide]
item.description: Sanitation protocols for specialty clinics that protect patients & staff. High-touch disinfection, compliance & workflow-safe cleaning.

item.title: MA Healthcare Sanitation Regulations
item.description: Complete guide to Massachusetts healthcare facility sanitation regulations. DPH standards, OSHA, EPA, and Joint Commission requirements.

item.title: Admin Office Cleaning for Healthcare Operations [Guide]
item.description: Why healthcare admin office cleaning impacts clinical operations. Professional standards, HIPAA awareness & staff productivity tips.

item.title: OSHA Cleaning Rules for Medical Offices 2026
item.description: Updated 2026 OSHA cleaning requirements for medical offices. Bloodborne pathogen, hazcom, and PPE compliance for MA practices.

item.title: Scheduled Sanitation for Healthcare | How to Plan [Guide]
item.description: Build a structured sanitation program for your facility. Frequency, documentation & quality control explained by a 22-year clinical pro.

item.title: Terminal vs Concurrent Cleaning Explained
item.description: Difference between terminal and concurrent cleaning in healthcare facilities. Protocols, frequency, and when to use each approach.
